titleStmt.title: SII 20.236: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 236. (B.K. No. 120 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up behind the shrine of Narasiṁha, in the compound of the temple of Madhukēśvara.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1474, Paridhāvi, Srāvaṇa, s11u. 1, Friday, corresponding to A.D. 1552, July 22, Friday.

The inscription states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvaras Rāmārajayya, Tirumalarājayya and Venkatādrirājayya, the sons of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rangarājayya of the Āravīṭi family, were govering the fort of Chandragutti, Padumappa, the attendant in the service of Rāmarāja and Venkaṭādri constructed two raṅga-maṇṭapas in the temple of Madhukēśvara, one for Pārvatādēvi and the other for Narasimhadēva. Padumappa acted at the instance of Rāmarāja and Venkaṭādrirāja and for their prosperity.
The king is stated to be ruling from Vidyānagari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Above the inscription are the human figures with she following namesrAma rAjanu tirumalarAjaya venkaTAdriya ULigada padumappanu.
div.p:
śubhamastu namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbha
vē harērlīlāvarāhaśca dauṣṭrādaṁḍa sa pātavaḥ hēmādrikalaśā yatra dhātrīchatra śriya dadhau . svasti śri jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana sakhavaruśa 1474 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 1 śukravāra dalu śrīmaṁma
hārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpasada śivadēvarāya mahārāyaru vidyānagariya(li) bīReaddā.
ḍinoḷu sukhasaktatathāvinōdadiṁ sakalarājyaṁgaḷaṁ sadharmadalli pratipāllisutaṁ yida sameyadoḷu ta
tpādapadmōpajīvigaḷumappa Āraviṭṭiya puravarādhīśvara haṁnibba gaṁḍa dharaṇīvarāha kaṭhāriya sāḷva biri
daṁteṁbara gaṁḍa sōmavauśa kulōdhārakarumappa śrīmammahamaṁḍalēśvara śrīraṁga rājayya dēvama
ha Arasugaḷa komāraru śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarājayadēva mahā Arasugaḷu śrīma
ṁmahāmaṁḍalēśvara ttirumalarājayyadēva mahā Ārasugaḷu śrīmaṁmmahā maṁḍalēśvara veṁkaṭādri
rājayadēva mahā Arasugaḷu caṁdraguttiya durggavanu sadharmadali pratipālisutaṁ yida sameyada
li śrīmaṁmmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāja veṁkaṭādrirājadēva mahā Arasugaḷa nirūpadiṁdalu sirasāvayisi
koṁḍu mahā prasādaveṁdu Ūḷigada padhumappanu māḍida sēve jayaṁtti vijayaṁtti kanakāvatige pratināma
vāda vanavāsiya puradali śrī madhukēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalu pārvatādēviyavara nivāsa sajjagruha
raṁgamaṁṭapa śālagrāmaśile suvarnaracita baṁdu sudaruśanayuktavāda śrī nāra siṁhyādēvara sukhani
vāsa raṁgamaṁṭapavanu taṁnanāḷuva svāmi śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju veṁkaṭādrirājayadēva
mahā Arasugaḷige Ācaṁdrārkastāyi Āgi Āyurārōgya Ayiśvariyābhivridhi putrapa UtrābhiUra
dhi danadhānyādivastuvāhanādigavāśapaśuhiraṇyābhiUradhi gajāṁka lakṣumi sthayiryā bhiUradhi Anēkadē
śādhipatyābhiUraddhi dēvabraṁhmara vēdōkta Āśīrvacanadiṁda dharmārthakāmamōkṣacatu rvidha paruśārtha
vauśaparaṁpareyu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi Ādityanavagraharu Ēkādaśasthāna phalavāga
bēku Eṁdu barasila(da) śāsanakke śubhamastu śrī mēruḥ śikharādrihēmanilayō ratnā maṇī maṁṭapō
nāgaḥ śaṁkharanaṁdivāhanajaṭājūṭaṁ ca gaṁgādharaṁ sōmārkaḥ sanakādivaṁtamuni bhasmā
haśitaṁ rājyaṁ bhōgasumaiśvaryasukhadaṁ gaurīpattiḥ pātu vaḥ . 1 . kṣīrāṁbhō nidhiratnamaṁṭapamahāsa
siṁhvāsanē vāmāṁkastitayā prasaṁnavadanaṁ śrīkāṁthayāliṁgitaṁ dōrdaṁḍāṁkitaśaṁkha
paṁkajagadaicśakrairudāraśriyaṁ ttāvatvaṁ yō kulaputrapautrasayitō lakṣmī stiraṁ jīvattu śrī śrī śrī śrīThe language of the inscription is very faulty.
Digital edition of SII 20.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
